name: Bailey's Irish Cream Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate, Bailey's Irish Cream, and heavy cream together over very low heat.
2. Whisk in the egg yolks one at a time; the mixture will thicken.
3. Whisk in the butter until combined.
4. Refrigerate overnight or until firm.
5. With a spoon, make small balls of the mixture.
6. Roll each ball in powdered sugar, cocoa, chopped nuts, sprinkles, etc.
